description: Code signing and transparency for containers and binaries
commit_message:
fix(verify): copy CheckOpts inside VerifyNewBundle to fix data race (#4917)

verifyImageAttestationsSigstoreBundle fans out one goroutine per bundle
sharing a single *CheckOpts. VerifyNewBundle -> rekorV2Bundle writes
co.UseSignedTimestamps for Rekor v2 entries, racing sibling goroutines
that read co via co.verificationOptions().

Add TestVerifyNewBundleConcurrentNoDataRace, which fans out concurrent
verifications of a Rekor v2 bundle against one shared CheckOpts and
fails under -race without th
